title: AI for Teachers with ChatGPT
description:
This course features Coursera Coach!
A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

In this course, educators will unlock the transformative potential of AI tools, particularly ChatGPT, to revolutionize their teaching workflows. You’ll learn to create engaging lesson plans, quizzes, and assessments in a fraction of the time, while also exploring project-based learning, student feedback techniques, and content creation strategies.

The course begins by introducing the core capabilities of ChatGPT, guiding you through course and assessment design. As you progress, you’ll explore integrations with other tools like SlidesAI for presentations, Education Copilot for collaborative content, and PrepAI for automated quizzes and test creation. Each module is crafted to be hands-on and classroom-ready.

You'll then move into advanced content generation using platforms like Pictory for media-rich outputs, Tome for knowledge sharing, and Wisdolia for intuitive educational support. These tools are explored in practical, teacher-first scenarios to boost both classroom efficiency and creativity.

This course is ideal for educators, instructional designers, and trainers at any level who want to enhance their teaching practices using AI. No programming background is required—just a willingness to explore how AI can streamline and energize educational experiences. The difficulty level is beginner.

By the end of the course, you will be able to design full lesson plans, generate interactive assessments, produce multimedia presentations, and seamlessly integrate AI tools like ChatGPT, SlidesAI, PrepAI, and more into your teaching strategy.
